feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: aftermath
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 647Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Dick can’t help but notice his brain is foggy and his body still feels heavy. He’s slumped against the window slightly, barely able to process what just happened. It felt like it all happened quite fast, in an spectacularly explosive way; one moment Dick is drinking his whiskey and then the next Jason’s knocking the daylights out of someone, yelling about roofies and for the guy who tried to lead him out of the club to get the fuck out before he kills him. Jason keeps looking back at him through the rearview and it burns—his gaze burns in an unexplainable way that Dick can’t even being to put into words. He knows Jason means well. He didn’t do anything wrong at all and Dick knows that, but the predicament in of itself made Dick feel so ashamed that he didn’t even want to be perceived.  Jason shouldn’t have had to save him. That entire point kept circling around his head, driving Dick mad.or: day six - jason saves dick from a spiked drink

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Dick Grayson/Jason Todd
  • Dick Grayson
  • Jason Todd
  • Alfred Pennyworth
  • Date Rape Drug/Roofies
  • Angst and Hurt/Comfort

entry.title: candy shop
entry.summary:
Author: mikaminato

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,210Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 27

Summary: "I guess I like... lollipops," Dick says, the word coming out a little breathier than he intended. Jason's smirk widens. "Is that so? Well, we've got all kinds of lollipops. Big ones, small ones. Swirly ones. Even some that change color as you lick 'em." Dick swallows hard. He's in way over his head. "Maybe," Dick says, his voice barely a whisper. "You could show me?"   (Or, when Batman learns that a neighborhood candy shop may be the latest front for Red Hood's operations, he sends Dick and Damian to investigate. Unfortunately, Dick gets distracted by the shop's ridiculously attractive owner, Jason.)

entry.title: Domination
entry.summary:
Author: Mariessa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,526Chapters: 15/25Kudos: 111

Summary: Dick struggles to keep his family together. Too bad life had other plans and he's meeting his maker. --- "I apologize." Dick's voice was far, far away. "I do love you, Jason. I love you like everyone else." "Well, I didn't." --- NOTE 2026: I am actively editing this so every once in a while you may see the word count change. I have cleaned up the tags also so its not as confusing for new readers and will update every few months.

entry.title: catch-22
entry.summary:
Author: mimingemotion

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,705Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: He didn't even remember what he said. The rage that clouded his mind had turned everything positively incandescent, from the shitty almost-broken ceiling light to the ugly green tiles, and then his mouth was open and he was yelling and Dick had taken one good look at him and- and left. Just up and left Jason's apartment like he was off to work, keys clacking and backpack slung over his shoulder carelessly. Jason hoped Dick wouldn't come back.

entry.title: Decadent Elegy on the Rusted Edge
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,666Chapters: 3/10Kudos: 36

Summary: Dick Grayson once believed that hard work alone could change his fate. By day, he is a top student in the criminal justice program at community college; by night, he wipes down the bar at a rundown tavern on the edge of the city just to survive. Heavy debt is slowly grinding away his pride.Until Jason Todd appears.The cold, arrogant, and wildly wealthy heir uses two thousand dollars to buy one night with him. That night, money and desire collide in raw, naked heat.From cold transactions to fierce confrontations, then to gradually uncontrollable possession and redemption — the two become entangled again and again on the edge.They both thought they could control the game, but they never expected that a decadent elegy of class, desire, and downfall had already begun to play.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: guwonim

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,303Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 65

Summary: An Absolute DickJay AU When a reckless stunt in the skies costs them their target, Dick decides it’s time to enforce protocol the only way his bratty vanguard pilot understands. entry.title: (Un)Buried Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Dickdaydreams

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,660Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: The truth is finally coming out. Of the closet. ------ “Did he inject you?” Nightwing asked, peering at Red Hood's neck. “Yeah, but I don't feel…” Jason trailed off as his body suddenly began to feel very heavy. The knife fell from his shaking hands. “Hood?” Nightwing questioned. “OK, I feel a little weird.” “It's truth serum,” Dick told him regretfully. Jason's eyes widened in panic. “Oh no.”

entry.title: "Thought You'd Like To See"
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,016Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: Bruce has come into possession of an unmarked USB from an anonymous sender. The note included with the device simply states “Red Hood and Nightwing in a compromising position - thought you’d like to see”.Bruce wasn’t prepared for what he saw on that tape - he watches all of it anyway. entry.title: To Love One Another Like the Sun and Moon
entry.summary:
Author: bluewingsofthenight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,648Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 15

Summary: “I would have never left you.”To this, Dick pulls back, a brief flash of pain mars his features, before settling to something softer.“I know you would never. You could never.”Smiling softly, he brings a hand to Jason’s cheek.“You came back.” Or: Jason may have left the palace, no longer a Knight, but he will always find his way back to Dick, to his Prince. entry.title: Freefall
entry.summary:
Author: onArete

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 159,553Chapters: 27/33Kudos: 548

Summary: Being Robin feels like flying: steady, wind-whistle certainty that what he and Batman are doing is right. Even with his hands bloody, Dick doesn’t waver. He knows they’re doing good: permanently removing the murderers and criminals from Gotham. Of course, nobody can fly forever.

entry.title: you were always a winner (the one i knew best)
entry.summary:
Author: lazarustears (ryyss)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,729Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: "Here to finish me off?" Jason taunted, his voice gravelly and hoarse, not quite what it should be yet. "Is this where you're holed up in?" Jason had been expecting Bruce again. He had almost expected Batman to crash into his dingy, shitty safe house, forcing his hand to fight lest he be placed into a place like Arkham, as though criminals didn't regularly break out anyway, oh, God forbid, whatever could he possibly do, he's so scared— He was not, on the other hand, expecting Nightwing. "Ha, you're not dead after all," Jason said.or: nightwing pays a visit to red hood. —for day 4 of ggh jdweek 2026:face fucking & "open up for me, goldie."
